query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_denied,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rdd.date >= '2026-07-01' AND rdd.date <= '2026-08-31' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as summer_denied,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) as unique_employees
FROM request_date_decisions rdd
JOIN requests r ON r.id = rdd.request_id
JOIN employees e ON e.id = r.employee_id
WHERE rdd.decision = 'denied'
  AND e.is_active = 1
  AND e.role != 'ancillary';

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ya87wqF7ZWNWxEH.1126fdfe9484 --database 8TTpjTbwNRkm8QcJp9ko4t --execute 
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_denied,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rdd.date >= '2026-07-01' AND rdd.date <= '2026-08-31' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as summer_denied,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) as unique_employees
FROM request_date_decisions rdd
JOIN requests r ON r.id = rdd.request_id
JOIN employees e ON e.id = r.employee_id
WHERE rdd.decision = 'denied'
  AND e.is_active = 1
  AND e.role != 'ancillary';
